query:
SELECT wh.id, wh.gestanteId, wh.templateId, wh.nomeGestante, wh.sentAt, wh.status
FROM whatsappHistorico wh
WHERE DATE(wh.sentAt) = CURDATE()
AND wh.templateId IS NOT NULL
AND TIME(wh.sentAt) BETWEEN '12:00:00' AND '14:00:00'
ORDER BY wh.sentAt
